feed.title: AO3 - Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Merlin/Arthur Pendragon (Merlin) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: A Legend that Begins With a Crush
entry.summary:
Author: Clearwater96

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,140,490Chapters: 138/?Kudos: 1,708

Summary: Arthur Pendragon and Merlin were literally from two different worlds. One is a prince from a great kingdom and the other a common farm boy from the next kingdom over. These two should have never met.But that was before they realized their parents were once friends and arranged the two of them to marry when they reached adulthood. That was before Uther turned on magic and Hunith went on the run with her infant son.Now, twenty years have passed and the Prince, Arthur Pendragon is far out of his depth. After four months of marriage and learning what he has about Merlin, he knows that things need to change, but doesn’t know what can be done.And with every attempt at trying going wrong, with mysterious boys showing up wanting to be a knight, strange physician’s trying to coerce his consort away, even stranger ladies who’ve seen to weaken Arthur’s brain, and the arrival of an odd Druid boy they need to risk it all just to get to safety…will Arthur ever get things to go right?

entry.title: Action without Attraction
entry.summary:
Author: Ace_Teagirl

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 25,300Chapters: 7/7Kudos: 32

Summary: Aroace Merlin and aromantic Gwaine are friends with benefits, using sex for stress relief, physical pleasure and emotional comfort.Arthur is asexual and very in love with Merlin.This seems like a recipe for disaster, but can they make it work?

entry.title: King & Court
entry.summary:
Author: BeautifulFiction

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 389,479Chapters: 82/110Kudos: 3,659

Summary: Loneliness is an insidious thing. When Merlin looks at Arthur, he sees not just a prince waiting for his time to rule, but a young man struggling to find his place in the world, with little help from anyone else. The truth is, Arthur needs more than the friendship Merlin can offer. He needs people he can trust: men and women who will become his court and his confidants, and if he is going to survive to take the throne and lead Camelot into its golden age, he needs them sooner rather than later. Finding loopholes in Uther’s laws is no easy feat. Court life is a dangerous game, but it’s one Merlin has every intention of winning so that Arthur can have knights of his choosing by his side. And then there is the matter of his magic…

entry.title: stonerlot
entry.summary:
Author: sonny_d

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,198Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 2

Summary: Following Arthur's death, Merlin lives his immortal life of shame living as the common man until he drowns in the bong water of youth. Though, by the grace of the marijua-lord above he is given a second chance, allowing him to correct the mistakes that haunted him for centuries. Crack fic that will someday cure my writers block so that my beautiful words can speak to beautiful creations rather than be lame behind a curtain of unseriousness. Soon, brothers, I will grab violently this curtain and thrust her sideward to once more let flow my genius. Ok thanks.

entry.title: Young Hearts, Run Free
entry.summary:
Author: NotoriousJYT

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 93,958Chapters: 11/60Kudos: 210

Summary: The night before Arthur faces his uncle's wraith, Merlin gives him a sword, a favour, and—unexpectedly—his heart. What begins as comfort before battle becomes something neither can deny: a bond that burns gold in their chests and rewrites the prophecy itself. But Camelot is no place for love that defies a king's law. When the Questing Beast appears in the Forest Sauvage and Morgana's magic begins to wake, Arthur must choose between the prince Uther demands and the king Albion needs. Between fear and wonder. Between destiny and desire. Merlin and Arthur were once two sides of the same coin. Now they are becoming something far more dangerous: one heart, one destiny, and a love the land itself has begun to answer. Canon divergence (mostly). Fast spark, slow-burning consequences. Epic scope, intimate moments, awakened magic, and a love that changes everything.

entry.title: Lukewarm Annoyance's
entry.summary:
Author: wspkanlily_org

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,739Chapters: 3/12Kudos: 31

Summary: “What did you call me?” “A prat, now if you’ll please get out of my way.” He really did think he was gonna get beat up or pushed against a wall or spit at but instead Pendragon's lips moved to what looked like a small smile. What about this interaction made him so giddy? “You really can’t address me like that.” “Oh okay, do you prefer ass or?”   Or   Arthur is the captain of the rugby team in Camelot University and Merlin is a wallflower who keeps to himself, or at least tries to. After one interaction they both decide they hate one another. Both are perfectly content to keep to their separate ways of life but unfortunately for them, Arthur can't keep his grades high enough to continue playing. He needs a solution quick and the only tutor available is Merlin. Just his luck. Merlin agrees and they both vow to never speak to each other again once the semester ends, but fate or... destiny... might have other plans.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: but if we fall / I only pray / don't fall away from me
entry.summary:
Author: Katiebabyangel

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,098Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 63

Summary: After revealing his magic, Merlin promised his king that he would tell him if he was hurt or needed help. The aftermath of an assassination attempt sent him, injured, stumbling into Arthur's chambers to fulfill his promise. Once he did that, he figured he could finish getting ready for the visiting delegation and wrap up his chores. He wasn't sure why Arthur was being so weird about it. He was only lightly shot.Based on the prompt:"I have to tell you something.""Can it wait? I'm busy.""It's urgent.""Okay, fine. What's so important that you had to interrupt me?""I've been shot.""Why didn't you lead with that?"

entry.title: The Tiny Glow of Your Eyes
entry.summary:
Author: Itscanonifwewishenough

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 77,659Chapters: 17/22Kudos: 666

Summary: He shouldn’t have done it.Sleeping with his king — in the state Arthur was in that night.The worst part is, he doesn’t even remember all of it.— Just enough. The kiss. Arthur’s mouth, warm against his own. The breathless moans pulled from his throat. The way it felt like he was drunk — but even without the potion that caused all of this, Merlin knew one touch from Arthur would make him feel like he'd spent two whole weeks drinking in the tavern. And flashes of what came next.Enough to know that this time, he truly fucked up.So when he wakes, naked in his king’s bed, Merlin does the only thing he can — he grabs his clothes and runs.He barely makes it to Gaius’s chambers, disheveled and panicked, only to find the old man already holding the book Merlin now realizes — far too late — he mistranslated.And in that moment, it hits him. There is no undoing this. “Merlin,” Gaius says, voice low “pack your things. Go as far away as you can."“You’re carrying His Majesty’s child.” Or Arthur was being too much, and Merlin—a clumsy fool—mistranslated an ancient text and brewed a potion meant to calm His Majesty, only to end up pregnant with the king’s child instead.

entry.title: The Eternity of Life
entry.summary:
Author: DragonTraining101

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 65,645Chapters: 31/?Kudos: 73

Summary: Merlin attempts to take his own life, but instead sets in motion a series of events the gods did not plan for. The gods are now scrambling to force a new prophecy. Faces from the past and present blur together as Merlin tries to save the world he wanted to leave.

entry.title: Ezakıs and Humans
entry.summary:
Author: Merlin_In_The_Tavern

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 67,523Chapters: 16/?Kudos: 41

Summary: "Was there... was there truly a need for you to kiss me, Merlin?" "You were drowning, Arthur. Believe me, kissing a stubborn, ungrateful royal idiot was not on my itinerary today." One is an Ezaki, a prince searching for the Lake of Avalon to tear down the walls between their worlds. The other is a sorcerer, risking everything to seal the sword forever within its hidden waters. Beginning in Constantinople, the heart of the Eastern Roman Empire, and stretching deep into the Sassanid Empire to the ancient city of Gundeshapur—this is a journey set in 540 AD, where real historical events interweave with a high-stakes "Enemies to Lovers" romance. ✾ Long ago, as humans and Ezakis faced mutual destruction, their kings knelt before the sacred sword in the Lake of Avalon. A history written in blood was sealed with peace, and the Khazar Era began. Until Uther Pendragon rose to power and turned that peace to ash. Desperate, humanity turned back to Avalon. The lake's magic raised a colossal, insurmountable wall between the two realms. The magic was never to be broken; the gate, never opened. Yet, on the day the world tore in two, a power was born to change everything—Merlin.

entry.title: Eye-fucking across a round table
entry.summary:
Author: TheElizaRoza

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 50,089Chapters: 13/?Kudos: 47

Summary: Eye fucking: to stare at someone with nefariously explicit intent and for them to do it back is a bonus. Arthur Pendragon has a problem. He cannot stop staring at Merlin. At first he blames the fact that his servant is irritating, mysterious, and seemingly incapable of acting like a normal person. Then Morgana discovers Merlin's secret, magic begins slipping through the cracks, and Arthur finds himself uncovering layer after layer of the man standing beside him. Set during Season 2. Arthur learns Merlin has far more secrets than anyone suspected and discovers, to his increasing annoyance, that he doesn't seem to care.

entry.title: Kill Your Darlings➳Merthur
entry.summary:
Author: asomina

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 46,330Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 291

Summary: There's something off about the way Merlin is looking at Arthur. He's nervous, awkward and instead of hiding his suspicious behaviour with insults or jokes. He drowns Arthur's concerns with kisses. or.... In which Mordred disguises himself as Merlin to destroy Camelot from the inside. However, he mistakenly believes Merlin and Arthur are in an extremely intense, romantic relationship. Maybe he embodies Merlin a little too well.   Aka the body swap AU no one asked for.Featuring band favourites: Flirty Gwaine, lesbian awaking Morgana, himbo Arthur, Mordred being confused and Merlin finally getting the day off he needed.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Master of Time: Advisor of Kings
entry.summary:
Author: jaqtkd

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 26,504Chapters: 11/11Kudos: 14

Summary: The 'Master of Time' Series: A group of stories about Merlin's life after 5x13 and how he comes to fully understand his Destiny and 'The Once and Future King' prophecies. Book 2: Many years have passed and Merlin is continuing to seek out his reincarnated friends and form friendships with their families whilst he eagerly awaits the most important re-birth of all. Much has changed but much remains the same. What role will Arthur play this time around and how can Merlin help? This story is non-linear and based on real, historical characters from the Ninth and Tenth Century so, enjoy the ride!

entry.title: Would You Tell Me Why
entry.summary:
Author: Noel803

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,666Chapters: 5/6Kudos: 113

Summary: Merlin and Arthur have been together for two years. So, when Arthur finally got up the courage to propose, the last thing he expected was to hear the word no. What he really didn’t expect was that Merlin wouldn’t even explain why he won’t marry him. Obviously, Merlin’s magic wasn’t the only secret he had been keeping from Arthur all these years. But there is little time to solve his relationship woes as a new king who has just ascended to the throne in a neighboring country has demanded immediate audience in Camelot.

entry.title: The Scar Between Us
entry.summary:
Author: DILLIGAF_iykyk

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,311Chapters: 8/10Kudos: 92

Summary: The bandits came from the tree line like shadows given teeth. Arthur had his sword drawn before the first cry rang out, steel singing free of the scabbard as he pivoted toward the rush of bodies.They were outnumbered—six knights against what looked like twenty men, ragged and desperate, pouring from the dark wood on either side of the forest road.

entry.title: Of Magic, Dreams and Futures
entry.summary:
Author: rencq

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,970Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 18

Summary: Harry falls asleep at Hogwarts and wakes up in a place unfamiliar, a place called Camelot. He finds himself trapped here with Malfoy of all people and with no way back. They meet Merlin — young, powerful and nothing like the stories say and Arthur — a man quite like the stories say — sort of.
